name: Stewart Lee
bio: Stewart Lee is an English comedian and writer whose stand-up is characterised by repetition, internal reference and deadpan delivery. He began performing in 1989 in the duo Lee and Herring and co-wrote the controversial musical Jerry Springer The Opera. He won critical acclaim and British Comedy Awards for his BBC Two series Stewart Lees Comedy Vehicle.

timeline.ev: Begins his comedy career and forms Lee and Herring
Tours 41st Best Stand-Up Ever after a 100 Greatest poll ranking
Stewart Lees Comedy Vehicle first airs on BBC Two
Wins British Comedy Awards for Best Male TV Comic and Best Comedy Entertainment

accolades: British Comedy Awards for Best Male TV Comic and Best Comedy Entertainment (2011)
Critically acclaimed BBC Two series Stewart Lees Comedy Vehicle
Co-writer of the award-winning musical Jerry Springer The Opera
